hmong.acute_90_right_90_obtuse_90_180_straig: Acute < 90°, right = 90°, obtuse 90–180°, straight = 180°, reflex > 180°. Lub protractor raug tsim thaum kwv yees 1801; nws daim ib nrab voj voog tseem siv nyob rau txhua chav kawm geometry.
hmong.challenges_estimate_classify_measure: Cov kev sib tw — kwv yees, faib hom, ntsuas
hmong.estimation_builds_spatial_sense_precis: Kev kwv yees tsim kev nkag siab txog qhov chaw; kev ntsuas raug meej tsim kev goom siv protractor. Common Core 4.MD.5–7: saib lub kaum ua feem ntawm ib puag voj (1/360 ntawm ib voj).
hmong.learn_the_angle_relationships: Kawm — kev sib raug zoo ntawm cov kaum
hmong.complementary_sum_to_90_supplementary_: Cov kaum complementary sib ntxiv tau 90°; supplementary tau 180°; cov kaum vertical sib npaug; cov kaum alternate interior sib haum thaum ob txoj kab sib npaug. Plaub qhov tseeb no qhib feem ntau ntawm cov pov thawj hauv qib nrab.
hmong.tools_bisector_second_ray_calculator: Cov cuab yeej — bisector, ray thib ob, lub xam
hmong.bisect_cut_in_half_the_construction_wi: Bisect = txiav ua ob feem sib npaug (kev tsim nrog compass + straightedge nyob hauv Euclid phau Elements, Phau I, Proposition 9). Cov cuab yeej niaj hnub no: protractor, angle saw, theodolite — tib lub tswv yim, raug kho.
hmong.pin_this_angle_on_protractor: Kaus lub kaum no rau saum protractor

hmong.click_to_get_personalized_angle_tips_2: Nyem los tau cov lus qhia txog kaum rau koj!

hmong.look_at_the_angle_on_the_protractor_nu: Saib lub kaum saum protractor (cov nab npawb raug zais). Pes tsawg degrees?
hmong.angle_relationships: 🔗 Kev sib raug zoo ntawm cov kaum
hmong.two_angles_that_add_to_90: Ob lub kaum uas sib ntxiv tau 90°
hmong.two_angles_that_add_to_180: Ob lub kaum uas sib ntxiv tau 180°

hmong.angles_that_share_a_common_vertex_and_: Cov kaum uas sib koom ib lub vertex thiab ib sab
hmong.triangle_angle_sum_a_b_c_180: 🔺 Cov kaum ntawm daim duab peb sab sib ntxiv (∠A + ∠B + ∠C = 180°)

hmong.recent_angles: 📜 Cov kaum tsis ntev los no

hmong.two_rays_overlap_exactly_no_rotation: Ob tug ray sib npog raug meej. Tsis muaj kev tig.
hmong.less_than_a_right_angle_pizza_slice_le: Me dua right angle. Ib daim pizza, «me dua lub kaum ntawm daim square».
hmong.exactly_90_corner_of_a_square_perpendi: Raug meej 90°. Lub kaum ntawm daim square. Cov kab perpendicular.
hmong.between_right_and_straight_wider_than_: Nyob nruab nrab ntawm right thiab straight. Dav dua lub kaum ntawm daim square.
hmong.half_rotation_the_two_rays_form_a_stra: Ib nrab ncig. Ob tug ray tsim ib txoj kab ncaj.
hmong.greater_than_a_straight_angle_measure_: Loj dua straight angle. Ntsuas sab «nraud» ntawm lub kaum.
hmong.complete_turn_the_two_rays_overlap_exa: Ncig tiav. Ob tug ray sib npog raug meej (zoo li 0°, tab sis tig tag nrho ib voj).
hmong.angles_reference_library: 📐 Lub tsev qiv ntawv qhia txog kaum
hmong.interactive_geometry_references_pick_a: Cov ntaub ntawv geometry sib tham — xaiv ib lub ncauj lus.
hmong.types_of_angles_by_size: < Cov hom kaum raws li qhov loj
hmong.angle_pair_relationships: ⫯ Kev sib raug zoo ntawm khub kaum
hmong.interior_angle_sum_n_2_180_for_any_n_s: Interior angle sum = (n − 2) × 180° rau txhua n-gon. Txhua exterior angle ntawm regular polygon = 360°/n. Cov exterior angle sib ntxiv ib txwm = 360°.
hmong.soh_cah_toa_sine_opp_hyp_cosine_adj_hy: SOH-CAH-TOA: sine = opposite/hypotenuse, cosine = adjacent/hypotenuse, tangent = opposite/adjacent. Cov trig functions muab ratio ntawm cov sab hauv right triangle; nthuav mus rau txhua kaum los ntawm unit circle.
hmong.these_angles_their_trig_values_are_wor: Cov kaum no + lawv cov trig values tsim nyog nco — lawv tshwm sim rov qab hauv lej, physics, thiab engineering.
hmong.1_rad_180_57_296_1_180_0_01745_rad_1_g: 1 rad = 180/π ≈ 57.296°. 1° = π/180 ≈ 0.01745 rad. 1 gradian = 0.9°. Feem ntau cov xam muaj lub switch degree/radian mode — xyuas kom koj nyob rau mode yog!
hmong.real_world_angles: 🌍 Cov kaum hauv ntiaj teb tiag
hmong.angle_problem_solving_shortcuts: ⚡ Cov txoj hloov daws teeb meem kaum
hmong.bearings_measured_clockwise_from_north: Cov bearing raug ntsuas raws li koob moos txij sab qaum teb. Tus compass 16 lub taw muaj 22.5° nruab nrab ntawm cov taw sib ze.
hmong.tower_of_pisa_actual_lean_4: Tus Pej Thuam Pisa — qhov nyo tiag ≈ 4°
hmong.three_views_of_the_same_trigonometric_: Peb qhov saib ntawm tib lub xwm txheej trigonometric. Rub lub slider kaum (los yog qhov siab ntawm tus pej thuam) — peb qhov representation hloov ua ke. Ces sim ua inverse problem quiz: daws ib qho ntsuas tiag los ntawm ib qho representation xwb.
hmong.change_the_angle_and_watch_all_three_u: Hloov lub kaum thiab saib peb qho hloov ua ke — «tib lub tswv yim, peb qho representation» txhais li ntawd.
hmong.tower_height_in_meters: Qhov siab ntawm pej thuam (ua meters)
hmong.pisa_is_roughly_56_m_tall_leaning_4_to: (Tus Pej Thuam Pisa siab kwv yees 56 m, nyo ≈ 4° niaj hnub no)
hmong.each_quiz_gives_you_partial_info_use_t: Txhua quiz muab cov ntaub ntawv ib feem rau koj. Siv cov kev sib raug zoo uas nthuav saum toj los xam qhov nqi ploj.
hmong.tip_rearrange_tan_opp_adj_if_you_know_: Lus qhia: rov npaj tan(θ) = opposite/adjacent — yog koj paub θ thiab ib sab, koj nrhiav tau lwm sab. Yog koj paub ob sab, siv arctangent.
hmong.quantity_with_both_magnitude_and_direc: Qhov muaj ob qho magnitude thiab direction. Kos ua ib rab xub. Piv txwv: velocity, force, displacement.
hmong.scalar_just_a_number_mass_temperature_: Scalar = tsuas yog ib tug nab npawb (mass, kub, sij hawm). Vector = magnitude + direction.
hmong.place_tail_of_second_at_head_of_first_: Tso tus tail ntawm tus thib ob rau ntawm lub head ntawm tus thib ib. Sib ntxiv = txij tail ntawm tus thib ib mus rau head ntawm tus thib ob.
hmong.place_tails_together_diagonal_of_paral: Tso cov tail ua ke. Diagonal ntawm parallelogram = sib ntxiv.
hmong.vector_v_at_angle_v_v_cos_v_y_v_sin: Vector v ntawm kaum θ: vₓ = v·cos θ, v_y = v·sin θ.
hmong.v_v_v_y_v_z_pythagoras_in_any_dimensio: |v| = √(vₓ² + v_y² + v_z²). Pythagoras hauv txhua dimension.
hmong.magnitude_1_v_v_v_often_called_the_dir: Magnitude 1. v̂ = v / |v|. Feem ntau hu ua «direction» ntawm v.
hmong.a_b_a_b_cos_gives_scalar_zero_when_per: a·b = |a||b|cos θ. Muab scalar. Xoom thaum perpendicular. Tsawg dua xoom thaum kaum > 90°.
hmong.a_b_a_b_sin_n_gives_vector_perpendicul: a×b = |a||b|sin θ · n̂. Muab vector perpendicular rau ob qho. Magnitude = area ntawm parallelogram.
hmong.curl_fingers_from_a_to_b_thumb_points_: Curl koj cov ntiv tes txij a mus rau b. Tus ntiv xoo taw rau direction ntawm a×b. (Right-handed coordinates.)
hmong.c_a_c_b_generates_a_plane_or_line_of_v: c₁·a + c₂·b. Tsim ib daim plane (los yog kab) ntawm vectors.
hmong.newton_s_2nd_law_f_ma_net_force_is_vec: Newton txoj cai thib 2: F = ma. Net force yog vector sum ntawm txhua force.
hmong.airplane_heading_wind_vector_ground_ve: Heading ntawm dav hlau + wind vector → ground speed (vector sum).
hmong.equilateral_triangle_square_regular_he: Equilateral triangle, square, regular hexagon. Cov regular polygon tib txhij uas tessellate daim plane ib leeg.
hmong.interior_angle_must_divide_360_triangl: Interior angle yuav tsum faib 360° tau tag. Triangle 60° (×6), square 90° (×4), hexagon 120° (×3). Pentagon 108° faib 360° tsis tau → tessellate ib leeg tsis tau.
hmong.8_in_total_combine_multiple_regular_po: 8 tag nrho. Sib xyaw ntau regular polygons; tib qhov kev npaj ntawm txhua vertex.
hmong.aperiodic_tiling_never_repeats_exactly: Aperiodic tiling — tsis txaug rov ua dua raug meej. 5-fold symmetry. Tau txhawb kev nrhiav tau quasicrystals.
hmong.hexagonal_tiling_minimizes_total_perim: Rau ib qho area, hexagonal tiling ua kom total perimeter tsawg tshaj plaws. Hales ua pov thawj (1999). Vim li cas cov muv siv hexagon.
hmong.each_region_points_closest_to_one_seed: Txhua cheeb tsam = cov points ze tshaj rau ib lub «seed» point. Tshwm sim hauv ntuj (cov paj ntxoov giraffe, av tawg, kev npaj cell).
hmong.on_a_hyperbolic_plane_regular_pentagon: Nyob rau ib daim hyperbolic plane, regular pentagon (thiab ntau lwm cov duab) tessellate tau. M.C. Escher cov «Circle Limit».
hmong.colored_squares_that_must_match_neighb: Cov square xim uas yuav tsum haum nrog cov neeg zej zog raws li ntug. Ua tau simulate Turing machine → cov teeb meem tiling dav dav txiav txim tsis tau.
hmong.a_single_tile_that_aperiodically_tiles: Ib daim tile uas tessellate daim plane aperiodically (cov duab «kaus mom» thiab «dab»). Kev nrhiav loj tsis ntev los no.
hmong.in_a_right_triangle_a_b_c_where_c_is_t: Hauv ib lub right triangle, a² + b² = c² qhov twg c yog hypotenuse. Cov integer triple (a, b, c) uas ua tau raug hu ua Pythagorean triple. Cov «primitive» triple tsis muaj common factor.
hmong.for_positive_integers_m_n_with_no_comm: Rau cov positive integer m > n uas tsis muaj common factor thiab tsis odd tag ob: a = m² − n², b = 2mn, c = m² + n². Sim m=2, n=1 → (3,4,5).
hmong.careers_that_use_angles_every_day: 💼 Cov hauj lwm siv kaum txhua hnub
hmong.circle_has_most_area_for_a_perimeter: Circle muaj area ntau tshaj plaws rau ib qho perimeter
hmong.isoperimetric_inequality_4_a_p_equalit: Isoperimetric inequality: 4πA ≤ P². Sib npaug rau circles xwb. Vim li cas cov npuas xab npum + cov planet yog spheres.
hmong.sphere_has_most_volume_for_a_surface_a: Sphere muaj volume ntau tshaj plaws rau ib qho surface area
hmong.3d_version_of_above_single_bubbles_are: 3D version ntawm saum toj. Cov npuas ib leeg yog spheres; cov npuas sib koom sib ntsib ntawm 120°.
hmong.regular_hexagons_tile_most_efficiently: Regular hexagons tessellate zoo tshaj plaws
hmong.honeycomb_conjecture_proven_1999_by_ha: Honeycomb conjecture (Hales ua pov thawj xyoo 1999): hauv txhua kev faib plane, hexagonal tiling muaj total edge length ntawm ib unit area luv tshaj plaws.
hmong.triangle_is_most_rigid_shape: Triangle yog daim duab khov tshaj plaws
hmong.cannot_be_deformed_without_changing_si: Tsis tau txhaj yam tsis hloov qhov ntev ntawm sab. Vim li cas cov choj + ru tsev truss siv triangle.
hmong.square_tiles_fill_the_plane_with_no_ga: Cov square tile puv daim plane tsis muaj qhov khoob. Cov rectangle + parallelogram kuj li ntawd.
hmong.hexagonal_packing_of_circles_fills_90_: Hexagonal packing ntawm circles puv ~90.7% ntawm daim plane (zoo tshaj uas tau). Square packing tsuas ~78.5%.
hmong.fcc_hcp_both_achieve_74_density_kepler: FCC + HCP ob qho tau txais ~74% density (Kepler conjecture, Hales ua pov thawj xyoo 2014).
hmong.only_5_in_3d_tetrahedron_cube_octahedr: 5 xwb hauv 3D: tetrahedron, cube, octahedron, dodecahedron, icosahedron. (Plato tau tham txog.)
hmong.tetrahedron_is_simplest: Tetrahedron yog qhov yooj yim tshaj
hmong.4_vertices_6_edges_4_faces_minimum_3d_: 4 vertices, 6 edges, 4 faces. Daim duab 3D me tshaj plaws.
hmong.for_sphere_inscribed_in_cylinder_h_2r_: Rau sphere inscribed hauv cylinder (h = 2r): V_sphere = 2/3 × V_cylinder. (Archimedes qhov nyiam tshaj.)
hmong.16_vertices_32_edges_24_faces_8_cells_: 16 vertices, 32 edges, 24 faces, 8 cells. Nthuav tau ua 8 cubes (raws li Salvador Dalí).
hmong.single_sided_surface_cut_down_middle_l: Surface ib sab. Txiav hauv plawv → ib lub voj ntev dua. Txiav ntawm 1/3 → ob lub voj sib khi (ib lub yog Möbius).
hmong.closed_non_orientable_surface_inside_o: Surface kaw non-orientable. Sab hauv = sab nraud. Hauv 3D tsim tau los ntawm kev txiav hla nws tus kheej xwb.
hmong.curve_of_constant_width_not_a_circle_c: Curve ntawm constant width (tsis yog circle!). Ib daim txiag dov du du saum cov Reuleaux triangle uas dov. Cov drill bit siv nws.
hmong.two_parallel_polygons_rotated_360_2n_c: Ob lub parallel polygon tig 360°/2n, txuas nrog triangles. Tetrahedron yog antiprism yooj yim tshaj.
hmong.has_chirality_left_right_handed_forms_: Muaj chirality — cov duab sab laug thiab sab xis. Ib qho ntawm ob lub chiral Archimedean solid (lwm qhov yog snub dodecahedron).
hmong.equation_z_xy_straight_lines_lie_on_it: Equation z = xy. Cov kab ncaj nyob saum nws ua 2 tsev neeg. Siv hauv Pringles + qee cov ru tsev.
hmong.gomboc_2006_is_first_known_mono_monost: «Gömböc» (2006) yog thawj lub mono-monostatic object uas paub — ib lub stable + ib lub unstable balance point. Zoo li ib yam khoom ua si sawv nws tus kheej.
hmong.cannot_tile_plane_alone_gaps_but_7_egg: Tessellate daim plane ib leeg tsis tau — muaj qhov khoob. Tab sis 7 lub egg-shape tsim ib pab hexagonal.
hmong.common_in_crystals_cube_nacl_octahedro: Muaj ntau hauv crystals: cube (NaCl), octahedron (diamond, fluorite), dodecahedron (pyrite, garnet).
hmong.truncated_icosahedron_60_carbons_like_: Truncated icosahedron. 60 carbons. Zoo li tus qauv pob ncaws. Nrhiav tau xyoo 1985.
hmong.helical_10_5_base_pairs_per_turn_major: Ua helix, ~10.5 base pairs ib ncig. Major groove + minor groove. Constant diameter ~2 nanometers.
hmong.hexagonal_prisms_with_rhombic_bottoms_: Hexagonal prisms nrog rhombic bottoms. Cov muv tsis xam nrog kev paub — biophysics ua kom area tsawg tshaj plaws automatically.
hmong.drop_spaghetti_at_random_average_numbe: Tso spaghetti random — average number ntawm crossings = (L/πd) × π × n. Siv los kwv yees π hauv chav kawm.
hmong.surprising_shape_facts: ◇ Cov qhov tseeb duab uas xav tsis txog
hmong.study_of_flags_comes_from_latin_vexill: Kev kawm txog cov chij. Los ntawm Latin vexillum (tus chij uas cov tub rog caij nees Loos nqa).
hmong.keep_it_simple_a_child_can_draw_from_m: Ua kom yooj yim (ib tug me nyuam kos tau los ntawm kev nco), siv symbolism muaj lub ntsiab, 2–3 basic colors, tsis muaj ntawv los yog cim, ua kom txawv.
hmong.most_common_2_3_e_g_france_germany_us_: Muaj ntau tshaj: 2:3 (piv txwv Fabkis, Yelemees). US 1:1.9. UK 1:2. Qee cov txawv: Switzerland 1:1, Nepal tsis yog rectangle.
hmong.symbols_added_to_flag_stars_crosses_an: Cov cim ntxiv rau chij (hnub qub, ntoo khaub lig, tsiaj). Cov lus heraldic piav lawv qhov chaw.
hmong.upper_left_rectangle_about_1_4_the_fla: Rectangle sab laug saum (kwv yees 1/4 ntawm chij). US cov hnub qub nyob ntawm no. Australia, New Zealand kuj siv canton design.
hmong.hoist_side_attached_to_pole_fly_opposi: Sab hoist = sab txuas rau ncej. Sab fly = sab tim (dawb).
hmong.red_courage_revolution_blood_blue_ocea: Liab = kev ua siab tawv, kev hloov, ntshav. Xiav = dej hiav txwv, ntuj, kev ywj pheej. Ntsuab = av, ntuj tsim, Islam. Dawb = kev thaj yeeb, kev huv. Daj/kub = kev nplua nuj, hnub.
hmong.flying_flag_upside_down_where_asymmetr: Tsa chij rov qab (qhov twg tsis symmetric); ib nrab ncej = kev quaj ntsuag.
hmong.light_blue_with_map_un_or_compass_nato: Xiav ci nrog daim ntawv qhia (UN) los yog compass (NATO). Txhob txwm zam cov cim teb chaws/kev ntseeg.
hmong.flags_are_codified_geometry_every_nati: Cov chij yog geometry uas raug teev. Txhua tus chij teb chaws muaj cov specification raug meej: ratio, color codes, positions ntawm cim, cov kaum ntawm hnub qub.
hmong.selected_national_organizational_flags: Cov chij teb chaws + koom haum xaiv
hmong.flag_design_principles: Cov hauv paus ntsiab lus tsim chij
hmong.roof_pitch_ramp_grade_tables: ◢ Cov lus qhia ru tsev pitch + ramp grade
hmong.x_12_means_x_inches_rise_per_12_inches: X:12 txhais tau rise X inches rau txhua 12 inches run.
hmong.149_597_870_700_m_defined_exactly_ligh: 149,597,870,700 m. Txhais raug meej. Lub teeb hla 1 AU hauv ~8.3 feeb.
hmong.9_461_10_m_distance_light_travels_in_1: 9.461×10¹⁵ m. Qhov deb uas lub teeb mus hauv 1 Julian xyoo.
hmong.3_26_light_years_distance_at_which_1_a: ~3.26 light-years. Qhov deb uas 1 AU ua kaum 1 arcsecond.
hmong.165_au_2024_fastest_human_made_object_: ~165 AU (2024). Yam khoom neeg tsim ceev tshaj uas tawm ntawm solar system. Tseem xa data rov qab.
hmong.620_million_tons_of_h_he_every_second_: H → He ~620 lab tons txhua second. Poob ~4 lab tons ua energy (E = mc²).
hmong.stream_of_charged_particles_400_800_km: Cov kwj dej ntawm charged particles. ~400–800 km/second ze ntiaj teb. Ua rau aurora + txaug tus tsov tus tw hnub qub.
hmong.notable_peaks_their_slopes: ⛰ Cov ncov nto npe + lawv cov slope
hmong.axial_tilt_drives_seasons_tilt_90_mean: Axial tilt tsav caij nyoog. Tilt > 90° txhais tau retrograde rotation (Venus, Uranus, Pluto).
hmong.can_you_cross_each_of_the_7_bridges_of: Koj hla tau txhua tus ntawm 7 tus choj ntawm Königsberg ib zaug raug meej lov?
hmong.no_euler_proved_1736_you_need_each_nod: Tsis tau. Euler ua pov thawj (1736) tias txhua node yuav tsum muaj even degree, tshwj tsis pub dhau 2 lub odd-degree node. Königsberg muaj 4 lub odd-degree node. Qhov no tso lub hauv paus rau graph theory.
hmong.using_only_compass_straightedge_constr: Siv compass + straightedge xwb, tsim ib lub square uas muaj area sib npaug nrog ib lub circle.
hmong.impossible_is_transcendental_lindemann: Ua tsis tau. π yog transcendental (Lindemann 1882). Tsim tsis tau nrog cov kev ua compass thiab straightedge uas muaj kawg.
hmong.construct_a_cube_with_twice_the_volume: Tsim nrog compass + straightedge ib lub cube uas muaj volume ob npaug ntawm ib lub cube.
hmong.impossible_requires_2_which_is_algebra: Ua tsis tau. Xav tau ∛2, uas yog algebraic degree 3, tab sis compass thiab straightedge tsim tau tsuas cov nab npawb degree 2ⁿ.
hmong.divide_an_arbitrary_angle_into_3_equal: Faib ib lub kaum twg los ua 3 feem sib npaug nrog compass + straightedge.
hmong.impossible_in_general_some_specific_an: Ua tsis tau dav dav. Qee cov kaum tshwj xeeb (xws li 180°) ua tau. Origami trisect tau ib lub kaum twg los.
hmong.given_two_circles_how_do_they_relate: Muab ob lub circle, lawv sib raug zoo li cas?
hmong.5_cases_separate_externally_tangent_in: 5 rooj plaub: sib cais, tangent sab nraud, sib txiav (2 point), tangent sab hauv, ib lub hauv lwm lub.
hmong.can_every_planar_map_be_colored_with_4: Txhua daim planar map txhaj tau nrog 4 xim kom tsis muaj ob cheeb tsam sib ze koom xim lov?
hmong.yes_proven_by_appel_haken_1976_first_m: Tau. Appel + Haken ua pov thawj (1976) — thawj lub theorem loj uas ua pov thawj nrog computer pab.
hmong.what_path_from_a_to_b_b_lower_minimize: Txoj kev twg txij A mus rau B (B qis dua) ua kom sij hawm ntawm ib yam khoom uas nphob qis los ntawm gravity tsawg tshaj?
hmong.cycloid_posed_by_bernoulli_1696_solved: Cycloid. Bernoulli tau muab (1696). Newton daws hauv ib hmos + 4 tus ntxiv (nrog Leibniz).
hmong.cut_a_circular_pizza_into_8_sectors_wi: Txiav ib lub pizza kheej ua 8 sectors nrog cov txiav uas hla ib lub point (tsis tas yog center). Cov piece sib txis muaj area sib npaug.
hmong.true_for_any_odd_multiple_of_4_sectors: Tseeb rau cov sector uas yog odd multiple ntawm 4. Ua tau nrog 8, 12, 16…
hmong.for_what_radii_of_intersecting_circles: Rau cov radius ntawm intersecting circles twg uas daim duab crescent («lune») + lens muaj area sib npaug?
hmong.ratio_depends_solved_analytically_roma: Ratio nyob ntawm — daws analytically. Romantic geometry los ntawm phau ntawv xyoo 1942.
hmong.intersection_of_two_perpendicular_cyli: Intersection ntawm ob lub perpendicular cylinder uas muaj radius sib npaug.
hmong.has_4_vertices_looks_like_a_4_faced_cu: Muaj 4 vertices, zoo li ib lub ncoo 4-faced. Volume = (16/3)r³.
hmong.drop_a_needle_of_length_l_onto_paralle: Tso ib rab koob ntev L rau cov parallel lines uas nrug d. Probability tias koob txiav ib txoj kab yog pes tsawg?
hmong.2l_d_for_l_d_method_to_compute_by_drop: 2L/(πd) rau L ≤ d. Txoj kev xam π los ntawm kev tso koob!
hmong.can_you_cut_a_circle_into_pieces_rearr: Koj txiav tau ib lub circle ua tej daim, rov npaj ua ib lub square muaj area sib npaug lov?
